reviews.comment:
Servicio de ACA muy básico,no tenían mecánico ni uno para recomendar,no tiene nada de servicios de conveniencia(alimentos,bebidas,etc),muy lenta la atención para servir combustible falta personal,poca cordialidad y predisposición para ayudar.

(Translated by Google)
ACA service is very basic. They don't have a mechanic, not one to recommend. They have no convenience services (food, drinks, etc.). Fuel service is very slow, they lack staff, and they are not very friendly or willing to help.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13734748019616020928/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURndk9lU1BBEAE
